criteria.description: Every expanded shape, span source/covered count, and origin/repeated/synthetic partition matches the bounded inventory.
Page-wide selection, returned-table count, rectangularity, and per-table cell partitions reconcile explicitly.
The answer exposes no page or cell content, URL, style value, raw attribute, or warning text.
Exactly one typed content-free summary call is used.
The response contains only the requested structural result.
